name: @opentelemetry/semantic-conventions
usage_summary: Imported in DefaultMeterProvider.ts. One symbol used: SemanticResourceAttributes.SERVICE_NAME (the string constant 'service.name'), which is used as the key when constructing the OTel Resource that labels every exported metric with the service name 'shopify-cli'.
total_releases_24m_note: npm registry fetch was unavailable (network/WebFetch access denied during audit). This package is stable and changes infrequently; estimated 4-8 releases in the 24-month window.
how_to_remove: SemanticResourceAttributes.SERVICE_NAME is simply the string literal 'service.name'. It could be inlined as a string constant in DefaultMeterProvider.ts with a one-line change, eliminating this dependency in isolation without touching any other file. However, the broader OTel stack it supports still depends on the other five packages.
replacement_reason: The single used value (SERVICE_NAME = 'service.name') can be inlined as a string literal. Removing this package requires only a one-line change in DefaultMeterProvider.ts, making it the only member of the OTel group that is a genuine removal candidate on its own merits.
